content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event Type & Context**: This is a pull request review for GO (Gene Ontology) annotation review of psbA gene (P48183, Zea mays - corn) encoding Photosystem II protein D1. The PR adds comprehensive gene review files and modifies GO terms cache.

b. **Request Type**: This is a code review request - the user wants feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key Information**:
   - PR adds 9325 lines, deletes 7790 lines across 9 files
   - Main deliverable: `psbA-ai-review.yaml` with 11 existing annotation reviews (7 ACCEPT, 4 KEEP_AS_NON_CORE) and 2 new proposed annotations
   - Supporting files: UniProt data, GOA annotations, deep research, notes, PANTHER family data
   - Large cache file update: `cache/go/terms.csv` (+7792/-7790 lines)
   - Follows established project patterns for gene annotation reviews

d. **Main Tasks**:
   - Review YAML schema compliance and data quality
   - Assess scientific accuracy of GO annotation decisions
   - Check file organization and naming conventions
   - Evaluate supporting evidence and citations
   - Validate against project guidelines in CLAUDE.md
   - Check for potential issues in large cache file changes

e. **Plan of Action**:
   - Read CLAUDE.md for project-specific guidelines
   - Review the main annotation file (`psbA-ai-review.yaml`)
   - Check supporting files for completeness and accuracy
   - Validate schema compliance using project tools
   - Assess scientific rigor of annotation decisions
   - Review cache changes for potential issues
   - Provide constructive feedback on the annotation review quality
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: GO Annotations for 9POAL psbA (PSII D1) I'll analyze this pull request and provide feedback on code quality, best practices, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage. #### Review Checklist - [ ] Read project guidelines and schema requirements - [ ] Review main annotation file structure and content - [ ] Validate schema compliance and data quality - [ ] Assess scientific accuracy of GO annotation decisions - [ ] Check supporting files and evidence - [ ] Evaluate cache file changes - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24819340221)
